items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has a high-level, strong Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu game.
items.quote: Paddy Pimblett is a high-caliber grappler. Paddy Pimblett has really good Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has a strong chin that will prevent him from being knocked out by Benoit Saint Denis.
items.quote: he's got the iron scouse chin. He's not getting knocked out by Benoît Saint Denis with hands.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is a high-volume, pressure-based fighter with a blitzing style.
items.quote: He's a southpaw who's got a very pressure-based game. It's high volume, it's consistent aggressive onslaught. It's a blitzing style.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has been taken down and mounted by Renato Moicano.
items.quote: We've seen him taken down before. We've seen him mounted and pounded on by Renato Moicano.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is returning to competition after a five-year layoff.
items.quote: Conor McGregor back after nearly 5 years.

items.claim: Max Holloway's move up to 170 pounds will improve his chin and increase his power.
items.quote: All I think it does is improve that chin, which is already legendary, and potentially up the power impact

items.claim: Max Holloway's pace and cardio will overwhelm Conor McGregor.
items.quote: Max Holloway's pace is overwhelming, his cardio is overwhelming, and his pressure and patient pressure-based style and ability to press forward and out strike are going to overwhelm The Mac here.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has never possessed great cardio.
items.quote: He's never been a guy with great cardio

items.claim: Conor McGregor is nearly 38 years old.
items.quote: Where is he at in 2026 at nearly 38 years of age?
